headline: Airbnb Backs WeRoad To Tap Growth In Curated Group Travel
summary: Airbnb, listed as NasdaqGS:ABNB, is leading a US$58m Series C funding round in group travel startup WeRoad. The deal includes an expansion partnership as WeRoad plans to enter the U.S. market with Airbnb's support. This marks an investment move for Airbnb outside its core short term rental and travel booking platform. For you as an investor, this development highlights how NasdaqGS:ABNB is engaging with a different part of the travel ecosystem: group adventures and escorted trips. The core...
